compiled_state.title: As a developer, implementation-plan uses ast-grep for file impact analysis when available
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Add ast-grep guidance to the implementation-plan skill's Step 3 (File Impact Enumeration) so agents use sg for structural pattern matching to discover cross-file dependencies when building the file impact table.
**Why**: The file impact table drives task decomposition. Using structural search instead of text grep produces more accurate dependency discovery, reducing cross-cutting interaction bugs.
**Scope**:
- IN: implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 3 update with sg command examples, command -v sg guard, Grep fallback instruction
- OUT: Changes to other skills, changes to gates/hooks, ast-grep pattern config files

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 3 (File Impact Enumeration) contains ast-grep guidance with a command -v sg guard and Grep fallback
  ← Satisfies: "Skills reference ast-grep in specific dependency discovery steps: implementation-plan Step 3"
- When this story is complete, running implementation-plan on a system without ast-grep installed produces no errors and falls back to Grep-based search
  ← Satisfies: "Graceful degradation"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] The guard pattern must match existing precedent in gate-2b-blast-radius.sh: check command -v sg (not ast-grep) before use
- [Maintainability] Keep the guidance concise — agents should see the pattern and example, not a tutorial

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 3 contains ast-grep guidance with command -v sg guard
- [ ] Grep fallback instruction is present when sg is unavailable
Verify: grep -q 'command -v sg' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: ast-grep guidance added with canonical guard/fallback pattern and tests
comments.author: Test
